name: Faust Table Lamp - 20.5 Inch Height - TBL4482 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the sophisticated charm of the Faust table lamp. Standing at 20.5 inches, this elegant lamp brings a touch of modern grace to any room. Crafted from sturdy iron, its sleek black finish complements a variety of decor styles, adding both functionality and style to your home. Whether placed on a desk or a bedside table, the Faust table lamp offers an inviting glow that transforms your environment into a cozy sanctuary. Its clean lines and minimalist design effortlessly create a calm and elegant ambiance. Discover how this versatile lamp can enhance your living space with its timeless appeal.
